reasoning: The base rate of a new pandemic is around 3% per year. Since the knowledge cutoff is November 9, 2025, there are less than two months remaining in the year. The likelihood of a new disease emerging and being officially declared a pandemic by the WHO within this short 7-week window is extremely low (roughly 1/6th of the annual risk, which equates to < 0.5%). Without any specific indications of a rapidly escalating global outbreak, the probability is near the absolute minimum. I predict 2%.
